intro: Become a master restorer and turn scrap into treasures.
description:
Step into Junkyard Garage Simulator, where every rusted wreck tells a story and every repair brings a forgotten legend back to life. Take control of your own fully equipped garage and immerse yourself in the art of car restoration. From scrapyards to showrooms, every vehicle is a challenge waiting to be mastered.

Game Features:
 • Inspect & Diagnose Every Detail: Rotate the camera freely, examine vehicles from every angle, and use tools to identify missing or damaged components before starting repairs.
 • Repair, Restore, or Scrap: Fix engines, brakes, and suspension, restore worn parts through interactive mini-games, or scrap components for partial value.
 • Customization & Tuning: Modify body panels, improve performance, and apply visual upgrades to increase vehicle value.
 • Test Drives & Quality Checks: Take restored cars on a test track to evaluate handling and ensure everything works properly.
 • Explore & Discover Hidden Stories: Search scrapyards and abandoned locations to find rare vehicles, hidden items, and mysterious traces.

Become a master restorer, revive automotive history, and turn rusted relics into priceless masterpieces. Every car you save is more than a restoration — it’s a story brought back to life.
